transcript.text:
[What's going on?]
Tzuyang?
Yes, that's me
I watched all of your videos
Thank you He is my subscriber
I didn't subscribe
[Then let me get you to subscribe today...]
[How was that?]
[Should I subscribe?]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat spicy chicken stew here at Jegi-dong
The dish used to be 10,000 Won here (~$7.62 USD) But now it's 16,000 Won due to inflation (~$12.19 USD)
Fried chicken nowadays cost 20,000 Won So it's considered cheap
I'm dying to find out
It's over here
It gives off a very old, traditional vibe

You can see that it used to be 10,000 Won
Hello
The inside even feels like it's been here for 50 years
I see the different combos
-Are these the toppings you can get? -Yes
Give me the biggest one, please
Should I add a side of potato pancake?
I feel like I've seen you from the bus
I was on the bus monitor before
Aren't you Tzuyang?
Yes I am
I knew I've seen that face from somewhere
-I was just going to watch your hot pot mukbang -Really?!
I was just about to play it
-I watched the Ulleung series too -Thank you
I just met my subscriber here

I didn't subscribe
[That's my bad]
[But he watched all of her videos]
[Let me go subscribe...]
[Different types of Jeon (Korean pancakes)]
[With Spicy Chicken Stew]
Thank you
Looks tasty I also see that the portions are huge
Even this too This usually doesn't come with the imitation crab meat
But I ordered it on the side
Bon appetit
I really love these
This is the favorite piece from the skewer
Wait, it can be a skewer like this
These 2 are my favorite pieces
Ham and crab meat

Egg Jeon is just fried egg, no?
It's like you pan-fry the egg with egg
It's big
Yum
I ordered the potato jeon because it looked appetizing
The pancakes taste very traditional
Just like the ones you make for memorial services
The ones I had when I was a kid
The dish costed 10,000 Won at first
How long ago was that?
I changed the price last year
Increased it to 12,000 Won latter half of last year, 14,000 Won early this year
-I made it 16,000 Won yesterday -Right, because of inflation
He puts 1 chicken if you order a Small
And that costs 16,000 Won
Other places charge anywhere from 20,000 Won to 30,000 Won

This is considered cheap
That's good
It'll be better if it cooks more
-How do you eat 18~20 packs of Ramyun? -Oh, you know that too?
I watched all her videos
You revisited the Udon restaurant and he was so happy
You really did watch them all Thank you
This really shocked me when I was younger Because it didn't taste like what I expected it to be
So i didn't really like it
But eating it now that I'm grown up brings me back the good old memories
I keep going back for the soup
A very strong garlic scent
This is a great dish for the Summer
I can feel the hotness going down
A bite of the drumstick
Let's cool it down

This kind of tastes like Budaejjigae (Spicy Sausage Stew)
So I think it'll be good like this too
In goes the crab meat
That's so tender
It's great because if it's too tender, everything breaks apart
This is intact, but comes apart when you bite into it
Feels like fried eggs, but tastes like Korean-style egg rolls
This is very addicting
I should take the chicken meat out
It's too hot
Chicken on top
This one's a Large and it's 30,000 Won For 2 chickens
So basically 15,000 Won for per chicken
You can share this one with 3~4 people So it's very cost-efficient
Wrap it with ham
[Eating it like it's a challenge mukbang...]

They have Andong Soju That would be good with this
Potato pancake with chicken
It's not spicy, but it has a kick Refreshing
I don't eat the liver Do you know what this is?
I would cringe hard when I accidentally eat that piece
Wings
My mom said she likes chicken neck
I think about this every time I eat chicken
I wonder if it's true
This is that circular piece you get from Kyochon chicken
Delicious
Drums? No
You're really really skinny in person
I always watch Tzuyang on YouTube
And there she is in front of me in real life
Thank you

Dreams come true if you look at it everyday
Another drumstick
[I still can't believe it...]
Drums
Some soup
Crab meat is the best
I want to add noodles and make fried rice after
Lovely
This is a great hangover cure
I had a drink last night
I actually drank a little bit
These are delicious But it's very hard to eat greasy food right now
So I'll to-go the pancakes
And I'll add noodles in the stew Fried rice after too
Excuse me, I had too much to drink last night...
So I'm struggling to eat the pancakes

Can I get these to-go?
And add noodles in here, please
More glass noodles as well, please
[Still finished 2 chickens while hungover...]
Everyone Don't drink too much
I won't drink anymore this month
[They have Andong Soju]
They gave me glass noodles here too
This is it
You don't really put Ramyun noodles inside Spicy Chicken Stews It's always glass noodles
But I have a feeling Ramyun noodles will be good too
Wow, that's very hot
But really tasty
This soup goes really well with Ramyun noodles
This is a must
Both Ramyun noodles and glass noodles go well with this soup

My shirt has been ruined once again
Always a mess
I'm eating like an ahjussi (old man) Making noises and all
Fried rice too, please
Looks great Thank you
Looks amazing
Fried rice at the end is a must
I'm going to eat it with chicken I have some here
Drumstick
With fried rice
[Are you sure you have a hangover...?]
Thank you
[Autograph time]
I told my sons that you're here at the restaurant
And they want your autograph
[Thanks everyone] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
